backend.changelog: Pre-Generate close-foreign-docs prompt now runs BEFORE attempting to open the BOM root assembly. Workstation Apply Update for CadBridge 1.8.53 strongly recommended -- BOM root no longer gets closed and reopened in the 3DPDF post-loop on Part-as-root or single-candidate Assembly-as-root BOMs.

cadBridge.changelog: Pdf3dGenerator post-loop now short-circuits the close-parent / reopen-standalone dance when the single 3DPDF candidate IS already the active BOM root -- whether Part-as-root (1.8.52) or Assembly-as-root with only the assembly itself as candidate (1.8.53). SaveAs3 + ExportAs3D=true on the already-open handle captures the doc view directly; no reason to close + reopen a doc that's already a standalone top-level. Saves ~3 OpenDoc7 + 1 CloseDoc per Generate run on the common Part-as-root case (visible as snappier 3DPDF phase wall-clock). Multi-candidate Assembly-as-root flows still go through the legacy close-reopen because sub-component candidates need it for ExportAs3D to capture per-part view (ADR-013 constraint). Defensive: any exception in the short-circuit falls through to the legacy flow so the existing path stays correct.
